title: South Shore and Washington Park community members’ fight against displacement near the Obama Center is ongoing

statements.summary: Introduced the Protecting Renters Ordinance to establish a rental registry and a new body to oversee housing disputes.
statements.quote: Mayor Brandon Johnson introduced the Protecting Renters Ordinance during Monday’s Committee on Housing and Real Estate. The ordinance would establish a rental registry and a new body to oversee housing disputes between landlords and renters.
